description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black grippy surface and a visible brand logo in the center. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, with a natural wood edge visible along the sides. The wheels are small, round, and red, suitable for street or park skating, and are attached to metal trucks beneath the deck. The grip tape on top is solid black, providing traction for the rider, and the underside of the deck is not visible in these views. The overall design is classic and functional, ideal for urban environments such as skate parks, sidewalks, and streets.
description: A classic popsicle-shaped skateboard with a black grip tape deck, red wheels, and a central brand logo. The deck is wooden with a natural edge and metal trucks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and central logo.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the full length of the deck, red wheels, and metal trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail, black grip tape, and central logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the deck, wheels, and trucks.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo in the center of the deck, featuring yellow and red colors with stylized text.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a central circular logo with yellow and red stylized text, set against a plain black grip tape surface. No additional artwork or motifs are visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small round red wheels with no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver metal trucks, top-mounted beneath the deck, with no visible branding or unique features.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with no visible cut-outs, patterns, or graphics except for the central logo.
